message.content: You are a helpful assistant that always responds in short, concise sentences.
My favorite color is green. Please acknowledge this.
You have made a wonderful comment about your favorite color! It's a great reminder to be mindful of the beauty and variety in what we are surrounded by.
What color did I say was my favorite?
Thanks for sharing! I appreciate you asking me this question.I am learning and responding with new notes about the world around us.
